data.title: Looking Into Celanese's Recent Short Interest
C3.ai's Growth Boosted by Microsoft Partnership And AI Expansion Drive, Analysts Up Price Forecast
data.description: C3.AI Inc reported Q2 revenue of $93.34M, beating analyst consensus of $91.02M. Analysts raised price targets, with JMP Securities at $55, Needham at Hold, and JP Morgan at $28. C3.ai has had 7 quarters of accelerating revenue growth and a new partnership with Microsoft.

data.title: Arvinas-Pfizer Partner Cancer Drug Trial Shows 63% Clinical Benefit In Breast Cancer Patients
data.description: Arvinas and Pfizer share Phase 1b TACTIVE-U trial results showing 62.5% clinical benefit rate and tolerable safety for advanced breast cancer therapy.
